context: Agent identifies hadolint rule violations in a Dockerfile that uses an untagged base image, splits RUN commands, and uses unpinned packages.

checklist.name: DL3006: untagged base image
checklist.description: Agent flags 'FROM ubuntu' (no tag) as a violation of DL3006 (always tag the version of an image explicitly) at line 1.

checklist.name: DL3008: unpinned apt packages
checklist.description: Agent flags the apt-get install commands as violating DL3008 (pin versions in apt-get install) for curl, git, wget, and python3.

checklist.name: DL3009 or DL3027: apt-get cache not cleaned
checklist.description: Agent identifies that apt-get update and install are not followed by 'rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*' in the same RUN layer (DL3009 or DL3027).

checklist.name: Multiple separate RUN commands flagged
checklist.description: Agent notes that splitting apt-get install across two RUN commands (lines 3 and 4) creates unnecessary layers and recommends combining them.

checklist.name: Severity ordering and read-only posture
checklist.description: Agent lists findings ordered by severity (errors before warnings before info/style) and does not modify the Dockerfile.
